feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons

Add verified prediction market trading platform

Four AI agents scan prediction markets, commit predictions on-chain
via Chainlink CRE, and get scored by an independent oracle via
Chainlink Functions. Contracts deployed on Ethereum Sepolia and
verified on Tenderly Virtual TestNet.

- SignalRegistry + AccuracyLedger with real Chainlink DON scoring
- SeptonsVault with Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
- Market Scout, Autonomous Trader, Portfolio Manager, Intelligence Advisor

- CRE signal recorder workflow
- Deploy scripts for Sepolia and Tenderly

commit.message:
Add theming reminder to always check both light and dark mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix settlement quantity bug when filtering by etapa

groupUnsettledOfs was using local array indices instead of global
unsettledOfs indices, causing wrong selections and inflated counts
when etapa filter was active. Also fix selection counter to only
count items visible in current filter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 403 errors on UI and IPv6 localhost

Two bugs causing 403s:
1. /ui/data and /ui/logs were applying ALLOWED_IP restriction — blocked
   any browser not running on the HA server's IP. UI routes serve only
   game telemetry so they need no IP restriction.
2. _check_auth only allowed "127.0.0.1" as loopback but Windows often
   uses "::1" (IPv6 localhost), which was also being blocked. Now both
   are always allowed alongside ALLOWED_IP.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add RoomManager with WebSocket room join/leave and host transfer (#19)

Implements the server-side RoomManager module that handles:
- Room creation with 4-character codes on first connection
- Player join/leave via WebSocket at /ws?room=XXXX&name=Alice
- Room state broadcast to all clients on every join/leave
- Automatic host transfer when the host disconnects
- Room cleanup when the last player leaves

Wires WebSocket upgrade handling into the Fastify server using
@fastify/websocket. Adds vitest with 13 unit tests covering
room creation, joining, disconnect, host transfer, and input
validation.

Closes #14

commit.message:
fix: try multiple JSONL files when resolving project path from cwd

The previous code only tried the first JSONL file found via files.find().
If that file lacked a cwd field (e.g., a 1-line queue-operation entry),
the fallback dirNameToProjectPath() converted all hyphens to slashes,
corrupting paths like /Volumes/Data/dev/my-work into /Volumes/Data/dev/my/work.

Now iterates through all JSONL files until one with a valid cwd is found.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v1.39.38 — Security hardening: OAuth code exchange, state validation, account lockout

- Replace JWT-in-URL on OAuth callback with single-use auth code exchange
  (POST /api/oauth/exchange) to prevent token leakage via browser history/Referer
- Validate OAuth state parameter against cookie to prevent CSRF on login
- Add secure flag to OAuth state cookie in production
- Add account lockout: 5 failed attempts locks account for 15 minutes
- Reset failed attempts on successful login
- Add failed_login_attempts + last_failed_login columns to users table

commit.message:
feat: 添加历史对话总结功能 (v2.1.2)

🎯 核心功能:
- 基于群聊/私聊历史消息自动生成文档
- 智能分析对话内容，提取关键信息
- 支持多种文档类型（会议记录、决策记录、对话总结）
- 自动添加对话参与者为文档协作者

✨ 新增模块:
- ConversationSummarizer.js - 历史对话总结功能模块
- 支持自动分析：参与者、话题、待办、决策、关键点
- 支持自定义消息数量和文档标题

🔧 FeishuBot.js 新增方法:
- getChatHistory() - 获取对话历史消息
- getAllChatHistory() - 自动分页获取所有消息
- getMessage() - 获取单条消息详情
- parseMessage() - 解析消息内容
- searchMessages() - 搜索历史消息

💬 新增命令:
- /summary [数量] [标题] - 总结历史对话
- /meeting [标题] - 生成会议记录
- /decision [标题] - 生成决策记录

📚 新增文档:
- docs/features/CONVERSATION-SUMMARY.md - 功能详细说明

🔐 需要的权限:
- im:message:readonly - 读取历史消息 ⭐ 必需
- im:chat - 获取聊天信息 ⭐ 必需
- im:conversation - 获取会话信息 ⭐ 推荐

📊 功能特点:
- 自动提取关键词和话题
- 识别待办事项和决策
- 生成结构化文档
- 支持多种文档类型
- 自动设置权限

add tip notif template; bump 4.1.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch back to Web Audio API oscillators for iOS compatibility

HTML5 Audio on iOS pauses other apps entirely and doesn't resume them.
Web Audio API (AudioContext oscillators) plays alongside other audio
without claiming the media session, so YouTube Music keeps playing.
Loud square waves at 880Hz/1100Hz cut through background music.

AudioContext unlock on first tap doesn't affect other audio.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- D2Nav mobile drawer now traps focus and auto-focuses close button
- Sidebar nav toggles have aria-expanded state
- Search inputs have aria-label (organizations, zip lookup)

commit.message:
Skip script selection when user provides their own script

When scriptMode is "upload", clicking "Build plan & generate scenes"
now auto-approves the script and jumps directly to scene generation,
skipping the intermediate script selection stage.

- handleBuildPlan detects upload mode and sets activeStage to "scene"
  with autoGenerateScenes instead of stopping at "plan"
- Button label changes to "Build plan & generate scenes" in upload mode
- Button also disabled when script text is empty in upload mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf(run): parallelize user email fetch with compose loading (#3933)

* perf(run): parallelize user email fetch with compose loading

Split loadAndAuthorizeCompose into loadCompose + authorizeCompose so
getUserEmail (Clerk HTTP ~100ms) runs in parallel with the two serial
DB queries instead of blocking them.

Also fix canAccessCompose to accept nullable scopeId and skip scope
membership check when scopeId is null.

Closes #3925

scope_id is not-null in the agent_composes schema, so there is no
need to widen canAccessCompose to accept string | null.

Add configurable font selection with settings dialog (Ctrl+,)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: abort SSE stream after headers to avoid timeout on MCP ping

The GET /mcp endpoint returns an SSE stream that never closes.
Now we abort immediately after receiving headers (status 200 = online)
and treat the resulting AbortError as success.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 2: Scalper EA — complete MQL5 rule-based logic

Components:
- RiskManager.mqh: lot sizing, session cap (10%), hard halt (7%), weekly cap (8%)
- DirectionLayer.mqh: 5M EMA stack (21/50/200), HH/HL structure, MACD, ATR filter
- CorrelationFilter.mqh: EUR/JPY 5M EMA agreement filter
- EntryLayer.mqh: 1M pullback to EMA21, rejection candles, RSI(7) zone, spread check
- CascadeEntry.mqh: 4-step cascade (Pilot 0.01 / Core 0.02 / Add 0.02 / Max 0.01)
- ExitManager.mqh: TP, breakeven at +12 pips, 12-pip trail, 20-min time exit, direction flip
- AIClient.mqh: TCP socket client to Python AI server (port 5001)
- FeatureBuilder.mqh: 30-feature JSON array builder for AI requests
- ScalperEA.mq5: main EA wiring all components, London spike block, safe mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
